name: carl-tools
description: Skills for multi-agent workflows, PR automation, product analysis, and more.

plugins.name: contacts-unify
plugins.description: Consolidate and dedupe contacts across macOS/iCloud/Google/Zoho/VCF into one address book with a provenance-aware review UI. Optional, opt-in Phase B ranks who you talk to from iMessage and builds research dossiers only on people you explicitly name.

plugins.name: research-person
plugins.description: Research a real person (friend or colleague) from public sources into a confidence-marked, cross-linked Obsidian People dossier.

plugins.name: pre-mortem
plugins.description: Multi-agent project pre-mortem — parallel agents with different failure-finding mandates, synthesized into ranked risks with mitigations.

plugins.name: profile-me
plugins.description: Build a personal AI profile from your digital footprint — portrait, working-with-me guide, and compact system prompt for any AI assistant.

plugins.name: second-opinions
plugins.description: Get validation from a different AI model before committing major changes — detects available LLM CLIs and routes to the best one.

plugins.name: django-smoke-alarm
plugins.description: Run and triage Django/DRF security smoke checks into real risks, hygiene, and false positives using clean-scan discipline.

plugins.name: handle-pr
plugins.description: Autonomously handle GitHub PR review comments — evaluate, implement HIGH/MEDIUM changes, run tests, commit, reply to all threads.

plugins.name: chezmoi-drift
plugins.description: Audit chezmoi dotfiles for drift, unmanaged files, and broken agent skill symlinks across Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and other harnesses.

plugins.name: trust-audit
plugins.description: Audit whether a product feels trustworthy or unsafe — covering permissions, privacy, billing, file mutation, and silent-failure surfaces.

plugins.name: support-storm
plugins.description: Simulate the support emails, reviews, and complaints a launch will generate, then identify product fixes that cut maintenance drag.

plugins.name: first-contact
plugins.description: Red-team a product's onboarding and first-run experience to find where new users get confused, think it's broken, or abandon setup.

plugins.name: wifi-qr
plugins.description: Generate a WiFi QR code PNG phones can scan to join a network instantly.

plugins.name: parallel-isolated-app-testing
plugins.description: Design parallel isolated test lanes for desktop apps and local tools with shared state — maps collision surfaces and splits non-colliding test lanes.

plugins.name: empathy-audit
plugins.description: Review code through four empathy lenses — user, machine, developer, support — to surface quality issues that pure technical review misses.

plugins.name: wide-open-brainstorm
plugins.description: Multi-model brainstorming room for product strategy and experience design — serious plus whimsical, multi-altitude, multi-round ideation.

plugins.name: launch-sequence
plugins.description: Run the full pre-launch gauntlet (first-contact → support-storm → trust-audit → pre-mortem) and get a single GO/CAUTION/NO-GO verdict.

plugins.name: decision-log
plugins.description: Capture a technical or product decision with chosen option, rejected alternatives, and rationale — in a format a future agent can read to reconstruct context.

plugins.name: post-mortem
plugins.description: Analyze a real failure — reconstruct what happened, find root cause, extract learnings, and feed them back into the skill collection to prevent recurrence.

plugins.name: scope-hammer
plugins.description: Ruthlessly compress brainstorm output into a shippable MVP — classify ideas as DELETE / MOCK / ALREADY EXISTS / SHIP and surface the shortest path to launch.

plugins.name: changelog-writer
plugins.description: Generate user-facing changelog entries from git history — plain language, audience-segmented, with optional CHANGELOG.md update.

plugins.name: agent-log-forensics
plugins.description: Scan Claude/Codex session logs to find agent behavior patterns, Toolsmith adoption gaps, repeated frustrations, and candidates for new skills/tools.

plugins.name: remote-host-verifier
plugins.description: Verify commands across this machine and named SSH hosts, comparing versions, install paths, config, and behavior with clean local/remote evidence.

plugins.name: release-operator
plugins.description: Run a CLI/app release end-to-end: verify state, update changelog/version, test packaging, commit, tag, push, publish, and verify installs.

plugins.name: status-copy-trust-audit
plugins.description: Audit CLI/app status output for confusing, inconsistent, or trust-eroding wording; verify idempotent repeated runs and align labels across clients.

plugins.name: visual-qa-loop
plugins.description: Run a repeatable before/after visual QA loop for local web/app UI changes, using stable screenshots, artifact folders, and concise visual findings.

plugins.name: ralph-loop
plugins.description: Repeatable multi-LLM codebase hardening sweeps: map under-reviewed surfaces, patch fixes, document learnings, and loop.
